title: Audit by legislative auditor
doc_html:
§1112.  Audit by legislative auditor

All transactions pursuant to this Chapter shall be subject to audit by the legislative auditor.  

Added by Acts 1976, No. 130, §1.
doc_text:
§1112.  Audit by legislative auditor
All transactions pursuant to this Chapter shall be subject to audit by the legislative auditor.
Added by Acts 1976, No. 130, §1.
